data.title: Palantir Stock Falls Nearly 4% In Thursday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) stock dropped 2.6% in the pre-market trading session on Thursday amid the Pentagon budget cut plan and the CEO's stock sale plan.

data.title: Tesla Exec Pins Delay In Cybertruck Crash Test Report On NHTSA, Says 'We've Known It Was 5 Star From The Beginning'
data.description: Tesla Inc executive Lars Moravy said on Wednesday that the delay in getting the crash protection rating on the Cybertruck was owing to the schedule set by the U.S. auto safety regulator National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA).

data.title: Barrick Nears Malian Resolution, Completes Feasibility Studies For Two World-Class Projects
data.description: Barrick Gold is resolving a dispute with Mali's junta over mining reforms. It halted operations and lowered production guidance, but signed a new agreement and plans to invest in large-scale projects in Zambia and Pakistan.

data.title: Global Markets Mixed, Dollar Dips As Traders React To Trump's Tariff Plans - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets closed higher with S&P 500 at record high. Fed held rates, Trump announced tariffs. Building permits up, housing starts down. Fed cautious on rate cuts due to inflation and trade policies. Healthcare sector saw highest increase, Dow and S&P 500 up, Nasdaq slightly up. Asian markets mixed, Europe and commodities up, U.S. futures down. U.S. dollar index down.

data.title: Trump Considers Alternatives For Air Force One Planes Besides Boeing, Says He's 'Not Happy,' But Dismisses Airbus
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is reportedly considering getting Air Force One planes from a different manufacturer besides Boeing Co.
